subject: fix(ux): replace undefined .input class with .input-field across 5 files
body:
The .input CSS class was used in 13 places but never defined in UnoCSS
config or any stylesheet — only .input-field existed. This was a
pre-existing bug masked by browser defaults. With Tailwind v4 migration,
these inputs would have no styling at all. Fixed all 13 occurrences.

Tags: ux, cleanup, tailwind
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: tailwind-migration
Semver: patch
